Extensible Markup Language: Corrected priority relationship between XML and XHTML. XHTML is more specific so should have priority. Error reported by Nationaal Archief, and NedGraphics b.v.

Extensible Hypertext Markup Language 1.0: Corrected priority relationship between XML and XHTML. XHTML is more specific so should have priority. Error reported by Nationaal Archief, and NedGraphics b.v.

Extensible Hypertext Markup Language 1.1: Corrected priority relationship between XML and XHTML. XHTML is more specific so should have priority. Error reported by Nationaal Archief, and NedGraphics b.v.
Macromedia Flash 1: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.
Macromedia Flash 2: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.
Macromedia Flash 3: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.
Macromedia Flash 4: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.
Macromedia Flash 5: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.
Macromedia Flash 6: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.
Macromedia Flash 7: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.

MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3: Increased number of sync bytes each signature variant is seeking to address increase in false-positives for unrelated formats being reported since changes introduced in v93 PRONOM update. Previously a set of null bytes was being sought near the end of an MP3 file to compensate for an old (since fixed) DROID bug with fragmented signatures, however these null bytes in the identification signature were themselves causing false-negatives.
SIARD (Software-Independent Archiving of Relational Databases) 2.0: Minor description update provided by Landesarchiv Nordrhein-Westfalen.
Tagged Image File Format: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition reported by National Library of New Zealand.
Cinema 4D 4.x: Adjusted description.
Adobe Illustrator 6.0: Added EPS as alternative extension.
OpenType Font File: Added Media Type font/otf and format classification 'Font'.
Cinema 4D 5.x: Adjusted description.
Adobe Illustrator 8.0: Added EPS as alternative extension.
Web Open Font Format 1.0: Amended Media Type from deprecated application/font-woff to font/woff. Added version number in line with official specification. Added format classification 'Font'.
SQLite Database File Format 3: Added version number 3. Submitted by Landesarchiv Nordrhein-Westfalen.
Genealogical Data Communication (GEDCOM): Minor adjustment to signature allowing UNIX new line variants.
Extensible Metadata Platform Format: Minor adjustment to signature allowing single or double quotes for tag attributes. Requested by Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.

Hasselblad 3FR Raw Image: Removed binary identification signature due to numerous false-positives reported via the Rosetta Format Library Working Group. We hope to implement a stronger signature in a future release.
Alias Pix Image File: Added .ico as an additional extension. Submitted by the Canadian Centre for Architecture.
Microsoft Excel Template 97-2003: Updated name from Microsoft Excel Template 2000 to refelect actual period covered by format. Added Media Type.
Initial Graphics Exchange Specification (IGES) 5.x: Added hex value '0D' as variant to new line character in signature. Submitted by the Canadian Centre for Architecture.
ESRI MapInfo Export File: Slightly adjusted wildcard ranges within signatures. Requested by National Library of Australia.
Macromedia FLV 1: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.
MPEG-2 Program Stream: Added .mod extension and explanatory note to the format description. Submitted by Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
TrueType Font: Amended Media Type from incorrect application/octet-stream to font/tff. Added format classification 'Font'.
AutoCAD Drawing 2007-2008: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition.

SIARD (Software-Independent Archiving of Relational Databases) 1.0: Added container signature in response to enquiry from Landesarchiv Nordrhein-Westfalen. Retained current binary signature for continuing compatibility with DROID versions earlier than 6.0, although the container signature method is preferred where available.
